narration: When the Sun and Moon align, tides soar to new heights.
visual_description: Hook visual: When the Sun and Moon align, tides soar to new heights.

narration: But when they pull at right angles? Tides calm down. Welcome to the world of tides!

narration: Spring tides—higher and stronger—occur during full and new moons.

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Spring tides—higher and stronger—occur during full and new moons.

narration: Neap tides, on the other hand, show up during the first and last quarters. They keep things moderate.
